headline: Why The McDonald's (MCD) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Growth And Valuation
summary: McDonald's latest analyst update trims its fair value price target from US$345.00 to US$330.00, signaling a slightly more cautious stance on what the stock might be worth. This change lines up with recent Street research, where bullish and bearish views are both active as firms reset expectations and adjust their targets. As you read on, you will see what is driving these moves and how to keep track of the story as it develops. Stay updated as the Fair Value for McDonald's shifts by adding it...

headline: If Treasury Yields Jump Above 4.75%, Here’s What Happens to SDY
summary: The SPDR S&P Dividend ETF (NYSEARCA:SDY) is doing exactly what a yield-tilted dividend fund is supposed to do while the broader market wobbles: grinding higher while the broad market wobbles. SDY trades near $146, up 4% year to date after the S&P 500 finished Q1 2026 in negative territory. Over the past year, SDY has ... If Treasury Yields Jump Above 4.75%, Here’s What Happens to SDY

headline: They Asked Early Retirees With Most Of Their Wealth In The Stock Market If They Are Nervous. 'Even Low Tech Companies Like McDonald's Worry Me'

headline: Constellation Brands Announces Election of Morgan Flatley as New Independent Board Director
summary: ROCHESTER, N.Y., May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, today announced the election of Morgan Flatley of McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE: MCD), the world’s leading global foodservice retailer, to serve as a member of its Board of Directors effective May 20, 2026. “We’re excited to welcome Morgan to Constellation Brands’ Board of Directors,” said Constellation Brands Board Chair Chris Baldwin. “Morgan’s extensive global brand-bui
